Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono seems to have stepped out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15603 0 0}I should get going since there's no time to waste. If I power walk to the station, it'll take seven minutes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}But if I consider the speed at which the train pulls into the station, three minutes might not be enough...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh yeah... I'm in charge of dinner tonight, so that's another twelve minutes to get groceries...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}I better compensate for the pressure ratio when mashing potatoes to avoid inefficiency...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}If an average potato's diameter is about twelve centimeters, then that comes out to...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Oh, forget it! Going home isn't worth the trouble! I'm staying at school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15621 0 0}Oh, it's you, {f 4 1}. Did you want to stay the night at school too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now that you mention it, I haven't seen that helmet lately... Oh, uh, I mean, that teacher.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't have time to fritter away looking for him either, so try again later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15622 0 0}You know, that helm of his really is a nice piece.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'd never say that to Mr. Ono's face because I'd never hear the end of it, but it's fine craftsmanship.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}The curved line at the top... It's an ideal arc for absorbing impact.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}An arc like that can absorb about 48% of the impact from above.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then there's the material. It's not just a thick chunk of metal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's extremely thin metal, in fact, layered with finely-braided hemp for added practicality...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Takenozuka keeps going[n]on and on with his lecture...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15606 0 0}So, that explains that. See? Isn't it a wonderful specimen?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1084 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hm? Its origin? I wouldn't know anything about that. I have zero interest in archaeology.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned how ancient[n]helms are constructed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono doesn't seem to be returning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to give up for today.[n]{f 1 1}
